heading: Distribution of funds among tribal organizations
label: 3057e–1 Distribution of funds among tribal organizations
notes: Amendments2006—Subsec. (c). added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 109–3651993—Subsec. (b). substituted “Assistant Secretary” for “Commissioner” in pars. (1) and (2).Pub. L. 103–171

children.heading: Maintenance of 1991 amounts
children.label: a Maintenance of 1991 amounts
children.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations to carry out this part, the amount of the grant (if any) made under this part to a tribal organization for fiscal year 1992 and for each subsequent fiscal year shall be not less than the amount of the grant made under this part to the tribal organization for fiscal year 1991.

children.heading: Use of additional amounts appropriated
children.label: b Use of additional amounts appropriated

children.text: increased by such amount as the Assistant Secretary considers to be appropriate, in addition to the amount of any increase required by subsection (a), so that the grant equals or more closely approaches the amount of the grant made under this part to the tribal organization for fiscal year 1980; or
an amount the Assistant Secretary considers to be sufficient if the tribal organization did not receive a grant under this part for either fiscal year 1980 or fiscal year 1991.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: 1 Definition
children.text: In this subsection, the term “covered year” means fiscal year 2006 or a subsequent fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: a separate application from the remaining members of the consortium; or

children.label: B
children.text: an application as 1 of the remaining members of the consortium.
